column1: Wavelynx 128-bit BCD (TWIC) PIV w/ MFC/MFD Smartmax, SEIWG and Wallet

column6:
- Includes DESFire cards per Google's request 
- MFC/MFD Smartmax support
- 128 bit BCD (TWIC) format: 
OPT_AUG, FIPS_201_INDEX , 0x0D
- SEIWG support
- Symmetry Wallet

Same as CPV7 but with Wallet and 32-bit MSB CSN's if enabled

Requires 3.2.60.3 firmware

column2:
Reads PIV Card Types: 
CT_ISO_14443A_4, CT_GENERIC_CL2, and 
CT_MF_DESFIRE_EV1_2.
MFC/MFD Smartmax
SEIWG Support

column1: ND 6/14/24: Smartmax support also adds SEIWG support to the reader with FW 3.2.60.3
